# MARKET OVERVIEW
### Current state
One hundred and ninety-nine sources ingested: 45 Canada Crude Oil Outlook monthly reports covering September 2022 through May 2026 (3.5 years), 52 Weekly Oil Products Updates (WOPUs) covering May 23, 2025 through June 12, 2026, 52 Clean Freight Weekly reports covering May 13, 2025 through June 9, 2026 (13+ months continuous), and 50 US Oil Weekly DOE data releases. The wiki now has comprehensive coverage of:

## Strait of Hormuz / Iran Conflict
The Strait of Hormuz is the narrow passage between the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman, through which approximately 20% of the world's traded crude oil and significant volumes of LPG transit. Disruptions to Hormuz flows .
